sectionSubtitle: Every tour is private, fully flexible, and led by a bilingual native of the city.

tours.title: Iconic Photography Tour
tours.description: The definitive visual journey through Brasília. We start at your hotel and end at the Pontão — hitting every unmissable landmark along the way.

tours.title: The Power of Brazil
tours.description: Go behind the architecture and discover how Brazil is governed. Visit the Palácio do Planalto, Supreme Court, and the congressional buildings at the heart of the republic.

tours.title: Modernist Brasília
tours.description: Understand the urban genius behind the Pilot Plan. We explore the monumental axis and Lúcio Costa's original vision for the world's greatest planned city.

tours.title: Hidden Brasília
tours.description: Skip the well-worn tourist trail. Discover architectural gems, secret viewpoints, and surprising corners that most visitors — and even many residents — never find.

photoTour.title: The Iconic Photography Tour
photoTour.subtitle: A full-day journey through the most photogenic landmarks in Brasília, with hotel pickup and drop-off at the Pontão.
photoTour.intro: Oscar Niemeyer designed Brasília to be photographed. This tour is built around that idea. You'll have time at every stop to capture the light, the angles, and the stories — guided by someone who knows exactly where to stand.
includes: Flexible pace — you set the speed

route.title: Hotel Pickup
route.desc: We start at your door — no taxis, no stress.

route.title: Catedral Metropolitana
route.desc: Niemeyer's crown of thorns in glass and concrete. Stunning inside and out.

route.title: Museu da República (Museu JK)
route.desc: A floating dome of history, surrounded by reflecting pools.

route.title: Praça dos Três Poderes
route.desc: The symbolic center of Brazilian democracy — Congress, Planalto & Supreme Court in one frame.

route.title: Palácio do Itamaraty
route.desc: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs — arches reflected in still water. One of Niemeyer's finest.

route.title: Palácio da Alvorada
route.desc: The presidential residence, with its iconic curved colonnade reflected on the lakeside.

route.title: Ponte JK
route.desc: Three asymmetric arches over Lake Paranoá — one of the most beautiful bridges in Brazil.

route.title: Pontão do Lago Sul
route.desc: End the day at Brasília's favorite lakeside spot — bars, restaurants, and a perfect sunset view.
